concerns.text: T005 [P] marked parallel-safe but depends on T004 (contract schemas). Cannot run in parallel with T004 since it consumes T004's output artifacts.
T016 [P] marked parallel-safe but depends on T013/T014 (data download). Matching logic requires downloaded data to exist first.
T027 [P] marked parallel-safe but depends on T025 (model fitting results). Permutation tests require fitted model outputs.
T040 (high/low disease group stratification) should precede T037 (ANCOM testing). ANCOM requires stratified groups as input.
T041 [P] marked parallel-safe but depends on T039 (centrality) and T042 (q-value filtering). Keystone flagging requires both outputs.
